name: pe-platform-summary
description: Generic PE platform template for models that organize returns around a dedicated Comparison/Summary tab plus a separate Promote/Waterfall tab. Activates when all three signature tabs are present.

mappings._comment: This template does not bind cell refs by default — cell addresses vary across deployments of this shape. The template's value is in the `hints` block: summary-sheet preference, scenario-column convention, and a vocabulary for peak-equity labels. The refiner uses those hints to find the right cells automatically.

notes: Scenarios are laid out as columns (H, I, ...) on the Comparison tab. The leftmost scenario (usually H) is the conventional base case. Use --case H on query/summary to target it directly.
The promote tab typically stacks several scenario blocks vertically (e.g. rows 1-92, 93-184, ...). Use `ete summary` to see detected scenario blocks.
carry.totalCell typically lives near the summary on the Summary tab — cells on the Promote tab labeled 'Total Cash Flows (pre-carry)' are a common auto-detection trap; doctor catches this.
basisCell is peak equity invested in dollars — reject decimals (cap rates) or single-digit integers that appear in label rows.
